info.name: Dub a video or audio file

items.docs: Creates a new dubbing project from an uploaded audio or video file or a source URL. The dubbing process transcribes, translates, and re-synthesizes the audio content in the target language while preserving the original speakers' voice characteristics.

params.name: dubbing_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the dubbing project.

items.docs: Returns metadata and status information about a dubbing project, including the current processing state and available languages.

params.name: dubbing_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the dubbing project.

items.docs: Deletes a dubbing project and all associated resources. This action is irreversible.

params.name: dubbing_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the dubbing project.

params.name: language_code
params.description: The language code of the dubbed audio to retrieve.

items.docs: Downloads the dubbed audio file for a specific language from a completed dubbing project.

params.name: dubbing_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the dubbing project.

params.name: language_code
params.description: The language code of the transcript to retrieve.

params.name: format_type
params.description: The format of the transcript output.

items.docs: Returns the transcript for a specific language version of a dubbing project, including timing information for each segment.

params.name: dubbing_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the dubbing project.

items.docs: Returns detailed information about the dubbing resource including all segments, speakers, and language versions.

params.name: dubbing_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the dubbing project.

items.docs: Translates a specific segment of a dubbing project into a target language. Allows fine-grained control over individual segment translations.

params.name: dubbing_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the dubbing project.

items.docs: Generates dubbed audio for a specific segment of a dubbing project. Creates the speech synthesis output for an individual translated segment.
